papers.title_en: Enhancing pulmonary embolism diagnosis: a squeeze-and-attention U-Net for precise detection and segmentation in CT angiography
papers.tldr: 针对肺栓塞（PE）诊断的紧迫性，本研究提出了一种创新的 Squeeze-and-Attention U-Net 深度学习模型。该模型通过在 U-Net 架构中引入挤压与注意力机制，显著提升了 CT 血管造影图像中 PE 的自动分割精度。研究重点优化了像素级准确性，为临床医生提供了一种高效、精准的辅助诊断工具，有助于缩短诊断时间并改善患者预后。
papers.abstract_en: Objective Pulmonary embolism (PE) is a life-threatening condition requiring rapidand accurate diagnosis. This study proposes a deep learning-based approach forautomated PE segmentation, focusing on both pixel-level accuracy and clinical …

papers.title_en: Adapting Federated Radiomics Models for Radiation Pneumonitis Prediction in Patients Receiving Thoracic Radiotherapy with Immunotherapy
papers.tldr: 本研究针对胸部放疗联合免疫治疗引发的放射性肺炎（RP）预测难题，提出了一种基于联邦学习的影像组学模型。由于医疗数据隐私限制了多中心数据的整合，该方法通过在不共享原始数据的情况下进行分布式训练，成功构建了稳健的RP预测模型。研究证明了联邦学习在提升模型泛化能力的同时，能有效保护患者隐私，为多机构临床决策支持提供了新思路。
papers.abstract_en: Background and Purpose: Radiation pneumonitis (RP) is one of the major dose-limiting toxicities of thoracic radiotherapy. Although multiple studies have attemptedto predict RP, robust multicenter model development is often hindered by privacy …

papers.title_en: Decoding the pancreatic duct: Multi-structure radiomics redefines risk stratification and early cancer detection in intraductal papillary mucinous neoplasm
papers.tldr: 本研究针对胰腺导管内乳头状黏液性肿瘤（IPMN）的早期癌症检测和风险分层，提出了一种基于多结构影像组学的方法。通过对胰管等关键解剖结构的深度解码，该研究旨在提高临床对IPMN恶变风险的预测精度，为早期胰腺癌的精准诊断和干预提供新的影像学证据和量化评估工具。
papers.abstract_en: Decoding the pancreatic duct: Multi-structure radiomics redefines risk stratification andearly cancer detection in intraductal papillary mucinous neoplasm Decoding thepancreatic duct: Multi-structure radiomics redefines risk stratification and early cancer …

papers.title_en: On the power and limits of foundation model image embeddings for privacy-preserving federated learning
papers.tldr: 本研究探讨了基础模型图像嵌入在隐私保护联邦学习（FL）中的应用，特别是在受隐私法规限制的医疗数据场景下。文章分析了利用预训练基础模型提取的特征进行联邦训练的优势与局限性，旨在平衡模型性能与数据隐私，为去中心化环境下的高效模型训练提供了新见解。
papers.abstract_en: While machine learning models generally benefit from including more training data,aggregating data, in particular medical data, can be difficult due to data privacyregulations. In response, federated learning has emerged in the last few years to …

papers.title_en: SHAPE: Structure-aware Hierarchical Unsupervised Domain Adaptation with Plausibility Evaluation for Medical Image Segmentation
papers.tldr: 本研究针对医学图像分割中无监督领域自适应（UDA）存在的语义特征对齐不准确问题，提出了SHAPE框架。该框架通过结构感知的分层对齐机制和合理性评估模块，有效地捕捉了解剖结构的层次信息并过滤了不合理的预测。实验证明，SHAPE在跨临床环境的医学图像分割任务中显著提升了模型的泛化能力和分割精度，为解决领域偏移问题提供了新思路。
papers.abstract_en: Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (UDA) is essential for deploying medicalsegmentation models across diverse clinical environments. Existing methods arefundamentally limited, suffering from semantically unaware feature alignment that …

papers.title_en: SAM-Guided Semi-Supervised Breast Lesion Segmentation in Ultrasound Videos with A New Dataset
papers.tldr: 本研究针对乳腺超声视频分割中高质量标注数据匮乏的挑战，构建了一个大型超声视频数据集，并提出了一种利用Segment Anything Model (SAM) 引导的半监督分割框架。该方法通过结合SAM的强大泛化能力与半监督学习策略，在减少人工标注成本的同时，显著提升了视频中乳腺病灶分割的准确性，为临床计算机辅助诊断提供了有力支持。
papers.abstract_en: Breast ultrasound video segmentation plays a critical role in computer-aideddiagnosis, but the scarcity of annotated data remains a major challenge. In thispaper, we collect a large ultrasound video dataset and propose a novel semi …

papers.title_en: TumorCLIP: Lightweight Vision-Language Fusion for Explainable MRI-Based Brain Tumor Classification
papers.tldr: 本研究针对脑肿瘤MRI分类中深度学习模型解释性差和超参数敏感的问题，提出了TumorCLIP。这是一种轻量级的视觉-语言融合框架，通过结合医学图像特征与文本描述，实现了高效且可解释的肿瘤分类。该方法在减少计算负担的同时，显著提升了模型在临床决策中的透明度和鲁棒性，为医疗AI的实际落地提供了新思路。
papers.abstract_en: Accurate classification of brain tumors from MRI is critical for guiding clinical decision-making; however, existing deep learning models are often hindered by limitedinterpretability and pronounced sensitivity to hyperparameter selection, which …
